purpose: Separate execution success from response numerical sanity and fixed-volume physical interpretability before any A1 electron-phonon calculation is authorized.

only_authorized_diagnostic_after_failure.name: same_geometry_stricter_response_point
only_authorized_diagnostic_after_failure.purpose: Test whether acoustic, Born-charge and ASR violations are numerical before changing volume, functional, pseudopotential, q grid or material.

claim_boundary: This audit classifies one unconverged PBE planning point. Passing execution does not validate phonons, dielectric response, Born charges, pressure, a reference gap, or any electron-phonon quantity. Failure authorizes only the single declared same-geometry response diagnostic; all broader escalation requires a new decision record.
